description_long: This is a single brown casual shoe with a low-cut design and a rounded toe. The upper appears to be made of suede or nubuck leather, giving it a soft, matte finish. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with matching brown laces and metal-reinforced eyelets. The sole is relatively flat and dark-colored, likely made of rubber, providing traction and durability. The interior is lined with a lighter, soft material for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the shoe appears clean and structurally intact.
description: A brown suede or nubuck casual shoe with criss-cross laces, a rounded toe, and a flat dark rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown suede upper, rounded toe, and lacing system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel counter and the shoe's low-cut collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth, unadorned side and the flat sole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe and the criss-cross lacing.
